proposed_prompt_improvements: Explicitly require validator integration in the runtime execution path (not module-only implementation).
Require defensive handling of non-object/null top-level API payloads and corresponding runtime-level tests.
Require typed validation exceptions to include the raw invalid payload so failed/blob write paths can persist exact response bodies.
Require at least one test proving validation failures are propagated through the client/orchestrator boundary used by blob-writing logic.
